info.description: REST API for Tango authentication, users, and streaming endpoints.
info.title: Tango API

get.description: Lists all API keys belonging to the authenticated user. Key values are not returned.

post.description: Creates a new API key for the authenticated user. The key is shown once and cannot be retrieved again.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an API key. Only the owner can revoke their own keys.

post.description: Changes the current user's password and clears auth cookies so they must log in again.
Authenticates a user and returns an access token. A refresh token is set in an httpOnly cookie.
Exchanges the refresh token cookie for a new access token.

post.summary: Submit a new build job from a Git URL

get.summary: Check if a git repository is accessible and optionally verify a branch

post.summary: Submit a new build job from an uploaded archive (.tar.gz or .zip)

get.summary: Get a build job by ID

post.summary: Pull an image from a registry
Restart Discord runtime with current config

parameters.description: Optional level filter: error, warn, info, debug
parameters.name: level

get.summary: List roles assigned to a user
